title: rhododendron cuneatum
intro: Rhododendron cuneatum, also known as the Cuneate Rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to the mountainous regions of northern India and Nepal. The rhizomes and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron cuneatum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Rhododendron cuneatum can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
